meaning: adj.[动]羊膜的,羊膜动物的adj.[动][解]羊膜的,有羊膜的
examples: The lungs of a fetus secrete a liquid that mixes with its mother's amniotic fluid.
The incidence rates of oligoamnios and amniotic fluid muddy 40 weeks after pregnacy were significantly highter.
Clear amniotic fluid coated the can of cinnamon rolls.
The artificial organs were created in a laboratory using human amniotic fluid and animal foetal cells.
The baby was born into a plastic tub or pool to contain the afterbirth and amniotic fluid.
